title: Adrift
lyrics: through the night, and then we all find a better way of taking control, through these nights, and then we all find a better way of taking control, here we are, side by side in the maze of life, maybe we'll find a way to make it through, maybe you'll tell me what I should do, but I don't like it like that, can't kick it back, can't handle any ways and there's no validation for us in here, baby, I think I made it clear, yeah, oh, what do you do when they all come for you, do you fall back to me, do you go on your own, or do you just go running back to your nightmares, baby, yeah, what do you do when they all come running for you, all the promises that you left are already broken down, and I can't even wonder why you don't wanna run, yeah, ha, ha, me and our love, I know there's still a spot more, feel it in your heart, what's left, why can't we feel healed, become more than misery, keep getting defensive, getting defensive, getting to find me, can't define the things that I see inside me, can't define the highest I've gone, how high that we can be, if we're matching energy, I guess I'll never be free, there's gotta be more than the fear that takes us through all this night, so that we don't recall that we're only looking for one way out, and that's, I hope you know that this could be the right, what you're running for, what you're going down for, why you're making us seem so deep, and we'll never ignore, down to death, weight of our choices that we never expressed in there, how it's all there, and we've left here for us one time, baby, then we'll drift, in our mind, our mind www.mooji.org Copyright © 2020 Mooji Media Ltd. All Rights Reserved. No part of this recording may be reproduced without Mooji Media Ltd.'s express consent. © 2020 Mooji Media Ltd. All Rights Reserved. © 2020 Mooji Media Ltd. All Rights Reserved.
